title: Problem reporting - Canada.ca
content:
- Food and Drugs Act Liaison Office

## Health product complaint process
- Reporting complaints about health products
- Health Product Complaint Form (FRM-0317)
- Handling complaints about medical devices (GUI-0065)
- Medical device complaint
- Recall Reporting for Medical Devices: Medical device initial recall reporting form (FRM-0360A) Medical device final recall reporting form (FRM-0360B)
- Medical device initial recall reporting form (FRM-0360A)
- Medical device final recall reporting form (FRM-0360B)
- Guide to Recalls of Medical Devices (GUI-0054)
- Mandatory Problem Reporting for Medical Devices Preliminary Report Form (FRM-0237) Final Report Form (FRM-0238) Preliminary and Final Report Form (FRM-0255)
- Preliminary Report Form (FRM-0237)
- Final Report Form (FRM-0238)
- Preliminary and Final Report Form (FRM-0255)
If you want to report an adverse reaction or a problem about another type of product, please visit Health Canada's Adverse Reaction Reporting web page.

## Materials, activities or any other matters under the Assisted Human Reproduction Act
- Reporting a complaint for the Assisted Human Reproduction Act
- Sperm and ova error or accident investigation report form (FRM-0447)
